svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Distributed System Architecture" id="distributed-arch"> <mxGraphModel dx="1422" dy="1200" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" />
<!-- Title --> <mxCell id="title" value="二脚ロボット分散制御システム アーキテクチャ" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=24;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="400" y="20" width="600" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="subtitle" value="Jetson Orin Nano Super (ロボット搭載) + MacBook (開発・可視化)" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=14;fontColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="400" y="55" width="600" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Network Layer --> <mxCell id="network-box" value="" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="430" width="1200" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="network-label" value="🌐 ROS 2 DDS Network (WiFi / Ethernet)<br>ROS_DOMAIN_ID=42" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="500" y="455" width="400" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ========== JETSON SECTION ========== --> <mxCell id="jetson-main-box" value="" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=3;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="100" width="580" height="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="jetson-title" value="🤖 Jetson Orin Nano Super (ロボット搭載)" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#fff2cc;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="110" width="540" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="jetson-spec" value="ARM Cortex-A78AE | PREEMPT_RT | 8GB RAM" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=10;fontColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="135" width="540" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Jetson RT Control Layer --> <mxCell id="jetson-rt-box" value="リアルタイム制御層 (200Hz, SCHED_FIFO)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="160" width="540" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="node-hw" value="robstride_hardware<br>✅ 実装済み" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffcccc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="130" y="185" width="120" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="node-state-est" value="state_estimator<br>🔲 計画" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffcccc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="185" width="100" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="node-safety" value="safety_monitor<br>🔲 計画" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffcccc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="370" y="185" width="100" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="node-ctrl-mgr" value="controller_manager<br>(ros2_control)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffcccc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="480" y="185" width="110" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Jetson Gait Layer --> <mxCell id="jetson-gait-box" value="歩容生成層 (50-100Hz)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="240" width="270" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="node-rl" value="rl_policy<br>🔲 計画" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#c3e88d;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="130" y="260" width="100" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="node-gait" value="gait_generator<br>🔲 計画" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#c3e88d;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="260" width="100" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Jetson Sensor/Driver Layer --> <mxCell id="jetson-driver-box" value="センサ/ドライバ層" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="400" y="240" width="260" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="node-imu" value="imu_driver" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#b1ddf0;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="410" y="260" width="70" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="node-rsp" value="robot_state<br>_publisher" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#b1ddf0;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="490" y="260" width="75" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="node-jsb" value="joint_state<br>_broadcaster" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#b1ddf0;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="575" y="260" width="75" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Jetson Hardware --> <mxCell id="jetson-hw-box" value="ハードウェア接続" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="310" width="540" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="hw-can" value="CAN Bus<br>→ RobStride Motors" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d4c5de;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=9;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="130" y="330" width="120" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="hw-imu" value="USB/I2C<br>→ IMU" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d4c5de;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=9;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="330" width="80" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="hw-cam" value="USB<br>→ Camera" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d4c5de;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=9;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="350" y="330" width="80" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="hw-gpio" value="GPIO<br>→ E-Stop" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d4c5de;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=9;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="440" y="330" width="80" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="hw-eth" value="Ethernet/WiFi<br>→ Network" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d4c5de;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=9;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="530" y="330" width="100" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ========== MACBOOK SECTION ========== --> <mxCell id="mac-main-box" value="" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=3;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="720" y="100" width="580" height="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="mac-title" value="💻 MacBook (開発・可視化ワークステーション)" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#dae8fc;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="740" y="110" width="540" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="mac-spec" value="Apple Silicon / Intel | macOS | 開発環境" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=10;fontColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="740" y="135" width="540" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- MacBook Visualization --> <mxCell id="mac-viz-box" value="可視化ツール" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#b1ddf0;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="740" y="160" width="270" height="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="tool-rviz" value="RViz2<br>3D可視化" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e3f2fd;strokeColor=#1976d2;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="750" y="185" width="75" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="tool-plot" value="Plotjuggler<br>時系列プロット" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e3f2fd;strokeColor=#1976d2;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="835" y="185" width="80" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="tool-rqt" value="rqt<br>GUI Tools" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e3f2fd;strokeColor=#1976d2;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="925" y="185" width="70" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="tool-foxglove" value="Foxglove<br>(Optional)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e3f2fd;strokeColor=#1976d2;fontSize=10;dashed=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="750" y="230" width="75" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- MacBook Development --> <mxCell id="mac-dev-box" value="開発環境" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1020" y="160" width="260" height="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="tool-vscode" value="VS Code<br>(Remote SSH)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#c3e88d;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1030" y="185" width="80" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="tool-git" value="Git<br>Version Control" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#c3e88d;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1120" y="185" width="70" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="tool-terminal" value="Terminal<br>SSH" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#c3e88d;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1200" y="185" width="60" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="tool-colcon" value="colcon build (ローカル)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#c3e88d;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1030" y="230" width="110" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- MacBook Data/Sim --> <mxCell id="mac-data-box" value="データ/シミュレーション" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="740" y="270" width="540" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="tool-rosbag" value="rosbag record<br>MCAP記録" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff9c4;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="750" y="295" width="90" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="tool-mcap" value="MCAP解析<br>データ解析" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff9c4;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="850" y="295" width="80" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="tool-gazebo" value="Gazebo<br>シミュレータ" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff9c4;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="940" y="295" width="80" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="tool-isaac" value="Isaac Sim<br>RL学習環境" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff9c4;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;dashed=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1030" y="295" width="80" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="tool-teleop" value="teleop_twist<br>手動制御" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff9c4;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1120" y="295" width="75" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="tool-joy" value="joy_node<br>ゲームパッド" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff9c4;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1205" y="295" width="65" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Network connections --> <mxCell id="arrow-jetson-net" value="" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.25;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=3;strokeColor=#d6b656;" edge="1" parent="1" source="jetson-main-box" target="network-box"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="600" y="500" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="650" y="450" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="arrow-mac-net" value="" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.75;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=3;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" edge="1" parent="1" source="mac-main-box" target="network-box"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="600" y="500" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="650" y="450" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<!-- Topics Flow --> <mxCell id="topics-box" value="" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;dashed=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="540" width="1200" height="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="topics-title" value="📡 主要なROS 2トピック通信" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="545" width="1200" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Jetson Publishes --> <mxCell id="pub-jetson-box" value="Jetson → MacBook (Publish)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="580" width="350" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="topic-robot-state" value="/robot_state (200Hz)<br>RobotState - 状態推定結果" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#fff9c4;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="130" y="605" width="160" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="topic-joint-states" value="/joint_states (200Hz)<br>JointState - 関節状態" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#fff9c4;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="300" y="605" width="150" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="topic-imu" value="/imu/data (200Hz)<br>Imu - IMUデータ" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#fff9c4;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="130" y="645" width="140" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="topic-tf" value="/tf, /tf_static<br>TF - 座標変換" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#fff9c4;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="280" y="645" width="120" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="topic-safety" value="/safety_status (200Hz)<br>SafetyStatus - 安全状態" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#fff9c4;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="130" y="685" width="160" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="topic-diag" value="/diagnostics<br>診断情報" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#fff9c4;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="300" y="685" width="100" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- MacBook Publishes --> <mxCell id="pub-mac-box" value="MacBook → Jetson (Publish)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="490" y="580" width="250" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="topic-vel-cmd" value="/velocity_command<br>Twist - 速度指令" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#e3f2fd;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="500" y="605" width="130" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="topic-joy" value="/joy<br>Joy - ゲームパッド" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#e3f2fd;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="640" y="605" width="90" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="topic-gait-cmd" value="/gait_mode<br>歩容モード切替" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#e3f2fd;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="500" y="650" width="110" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Internal topics (Jetson only) --> <mxCell id="internal-box" value="Jetson内部のみ (ネットワーク不通過)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="760" y="580" width="250" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="topic-gait-target" value="/gait_target (100Hz)<br>目標関節軌道" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#ffcccc;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="770" y="605" width="120" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="topic-estop" value="/emergency_stop<br>緊急停止信号" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#ffcccc;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="900" y="605" width="100" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="topic-ctrl-cmd" value="/controller指令<br>ros2_control内部" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#ffcccc;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="770" y="650" width="110" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="internal-note" value="※リアルタイム性のため<br>ネットワーク経由にしない" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=9;fontColor=#cc0000;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="890" y="660" width="110" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Bandwidth note --> <mxCell id="bw-box" value="帯域幅目安" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1030" y="580" width="250" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="bw-list" value="• /robot_state: ~100 KB/s<br>• /joint_states: ~50 KB/s<br>• /imu/data: ~30 KB/s<br>• /tf: ~20 KB/s<br>• /camera/image: ~10 MB/s (圧縮推奨)<br><br>💡 画像は image_transport で圧縮" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1040" y="605" width="230" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Legend --> <mxCell id="legend-box" value="" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;dashed=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="740" width="1200" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="legend-title" value="凡例" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="750" width="60" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="legend-impl" value="✅ 実装済み" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#c8e6c9;strokeColor=#388e3c;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="780" width="80" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="legend-plan" value="🔲 計画" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff9c4;strokeColor=#fbc02d;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="210" y="780" width="60" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="legend-rt" value="リアルタイム層 (SCHED_FIFO)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="290" y="780" width="150" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="legend-gait" value="歩容生成層" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="450" y="780" width="80" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="legend-sensor" value="センサ/ドライバ層" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="540" y="780" width="100" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="legend-hw" value="ハードウェア" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="650" y="780" width="80" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="legend-viz" value="可視化ツール" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e3f2fd;strokeColor=#1976d2;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="750" y="780" width="80" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="legend-dev" value="開発ツール" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#c3e88d;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="840" y="780" width="70" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="legend-opt" value="オプション" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#999999;fontSize=10;dashed=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="920" y="780" width="70" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Key principle --> <mxCell id="principle-box" value="⚠️ 設計原則: リアルタイム制御 (200Hz) は Jetson 内で完結。ネットワーク遅延の影響を受けない。MacBook には可視化・診断データのみ送信。" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffecb3;strokeColor=#ff8f00;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;align=center;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="840" width="1200" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
</root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

g.text: 二脚ロボット分散制御システム アーキテクチャ
Jetson Orin Nano Super (ロボット搭載) + MacBook (開発・可視化)
Jetson Orin Nano Super (ロボット搭載)
リアルタイム制御層 (200Hz, SCHED_FIFO)
MacBook (開発・可視化ワークステーション)
Apple Silicon / Intel | macOS | 開発環境
データ/シミュレーション
Jetson内部のみ (ネットワーク不通過)
ネットワーク経由にしない
画像は image_transport で圧縮
設計原則: リアルタイム制御 (200Hz) は Jetson 内で完結。ネットワーク遅延の影響を受けない。MacBook には可視化・診断データのみ送信。
